# BLOCKER_TEMPLATE

> Used by `@architecture-guardian` (or any agent invoking `@architecture-guardian` first)
> when a task cannot proceed without changing the frozen Architect Consultant
> architecture. Create as `BLOCKER.md` at the repository root (or link from
> `IMPLEMENTATION_STATE.md` if multiple blockers are ever active — expected to be rare).

## Blocker Summary

- One-line description of what is blocked

## Stage Affected

- Current Blueprint stage

## What Triggered This Blocker

- The specific task or decision that could not proceed

## Frozen Element(s) at Risk

- Which part of the architecture baseline this touches (pipeline phase, knowledge role,
  core rule, etc.) — cite the exact section of `Implementation-Blueprint-v1.md` or
  `IMPLEMENTATION_RULES.md`

## Why It Cannot Be Resolved Within Current Scope

- Explanation of why no in-scope option exists

## Options Considered

- Option A — <description> — <why rejected or why viable>
- Option B — <description> — <why rejected or why viable>

## Recommendation (if any)

- `@architecture-guardian`'s assessment, if it has one — advisory only

## Status

- Open / Awaiting human decision / Resolved

## Human Decision

- <recorded once the human decides — do not proceed until this is filled in>
